text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, January 26. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've noted the plans. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: The kitchen sink area has a problem. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Let's get that resolved. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
